issues.criterion: Nav link coverage vs source chrome
issues.details: Nav link coverage is 52.6% (143 of 272 unique almacgroup.com paths matched) — below the 60% threshold. All 8 top-level business unit sections and utility nav links are present, but 129 source paths are absent. Notable missing paths include: /our-locations (about sub-nav), many /about/* sub-pages (Leadership, Core Values, History, Policies, etc.), multiple /diagnostics/* deep sub-pages (BioPharma Partners, R&D Assays, News, Careers, Contact), many /api-chemical-development/* product catalog pages, /clinical-services/* division-specific pages (Blog, Meet the Team, Supply With Care), /clinical-technologies/* specific pages (Blog, Events, IRT Services), and several /commercial-services/* pages. Policy pages (/anti-bribery-corruption-policy, /data-protection-agreement, /supplier-code-of-conduct) also absent from nav.
issues.remediation: Add missing primary/secondary mega-menu links to config/nav.html. Minimum: restore all /about/* sub-pages visible in source mega-menu About section, add /diagnostics/news, /diagnostics/contact-us, /clinical-services/blog, /clinical-technologies/events, and all division-level News/Events/Contact sub-links. This will bring coverage above 60%.

issues.details: Source nav links to /pharmaceutical-development (top-level) but EDS nav uses /pharmaceutical-drug-product-development/ as the section root. This is a path change that requires the redirect /pharmaceutical-development → /pharmaceutical-drug-product-development to be present. No such redirect exists in redirects.html.
issues.remediation: Add redirect: /pharmaceutical-development → /pharmaceutical-drug-product-development (and trailing-slash variant) to config/redirects.html.

issues.details: Source footer links to /about-us/ but the EDS footer links to /about/. The redirect /about-us → /about exists in redirects.html which handles the mapping. Coverage is 93.3% (14/15 unique source paths matched after normalizing).
issues.remediation: Already handled by redirect. No action needed unless /about-us should appear explicitly in footer.

issues.criterion: Screenshot pairs not available — no live preview
issues.details: EDS_TOKEN was not available so nav/footer HTML files were not uploaded to da.live. The preview site https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/ could not be rendered with actual nav/footer chrome. Screenshot comparison against source-bundle/chrome/header-desktop.png and footer-desktop.png was not possible. Verification was limited to HTML structural analysis.
issues.remediation: Once EDS_TOKEN is available and nav/footer are uploaded to da.live, re-run visual chrome comparison against source-bundle/chrome/header-desktop.png and footer-desktop.png at desktop (1280px) and mobile (420px) viewports.

evidence.finding: All four files (helix-query.yaml, helix-sitemap.yaml, robots.txt, fstab.yaml) return HTTP 200 from GitHub Contents API on main branch.
evidence.render_strategy: GitHub API raw HTTP (no browser render required for API sidechannel)

evidence.finding: fstab.yaml mountpoints./ = 'https://content.da.live/manuel-vara/eds-migration' — DA.live mount point is correct and was not overwritten.

Valid YAML. 4 indices: site (/**), events (/events/**→/events-index.json), news (/news/**→/news-index.json), knowledge (/knowledge/**→/knowledge-index.json). All indices have required properties (title, description, image, lastModified plus domain-specific fields). eventDate, eventLocation, eventType for events; publishDate, division, category for news; contentType, topic, expert for knowledge.
evidence.render_strategy: GitHub raw HTTP + Python yaml.safe_load validation

evidence.finding: Valid YAML. 4 sitemaps: default (/sitemap.xml, excludes /client-login/**, /careers/resources/**, /category/**, /drafts/**, /nav, /footer, /fragments/**), events (/sitemap-events.xml), news (/sitemap-news.xml), knowledge (/sitemap-knowledge.xml). hreflang configured for default sitemap pointing to almacgroup.com.
evidence.render_strategy: GitHub raw HTTP + Python yaml.safe_load validation

evidence.finding: robots.txt disallows: /client-login/, /careers/resources/, /category/, /drafts/, /fragments/, /?s=. All four sitemap URLs referenced (sitemap.xml, sitemap-events.xml, sitemap-news.xml, sitemap-knowledge.xml). All auth-gated and internal paths correctly blocked.

55 redirect rows, HTML table with Source and Destination column headers. No redirect loops (source∩destination=∅). No redirect chains (no destination is also a source). Coverage: 4 known 301s (biotech×2, pharma-services×2), 36 careers/resources → /careers, 1 client-portal → /client-login, 1 blog-category → /news, 4 WP alias normalizations, 8 almac_journies → careers/stories. All 37 manifest careers-resource pages have redirects. Missing: /pharmaceutical-development → /pharmaceutical-drug-product-development redirect.

nav.html follows EDS conventions: logo paragraph, main mega-menu ul (8 business unit top-level sections with nested sub-menus), utility nav ul (8 links: About, Sustainability, Careers, News, Events, Knowledge Centre, Contact, Client Login). 174 total links, 165 unique paths. HubSpot tracking URLs stripped. All 8 BU section roots present. EDS nav block expectations met.
evidence.render_strategy: Local HTML parse (no browser render — EDS_TOKEN unavailable)

evidence.check: Nav link coverage vs source header.links.json
evidence.finding: 52.6% coverage (143/272 unique almacgroup.com paths matched, excluding HubSpot tracking URLs). Below the 60% threshold. 129 source paths absent from nav: 13 /about/* sub-pages, 14 /diagnostics/* deep-links, 19 /api-chemical-development/* product pages, 12 /clinical-services/* pages, 10 /clinical-technologies/* pages, 14 /commercial-services/* pages, and various policy/other paths. Top-level structure is correct but secondary/tertiary mega-menu links insufficiently populated.
evidence.render_strategy: Path normalization comparison (Python urllib.parse); source paths normalized to strip almacgroup.com domain and trailing slashes

evidence.check: footer.html EDS structure and HubSpot block
evidence.finding: footer.html follows EDS conventions: logo paragraph, hubspot-form block (div.hubspot-form with header row 'Contact Us' and data row portal_id=742105, form_id=61f11908-1f5a-47c0-b358-d1e2c3d076b2), Quick Links ul (9 links), Get in Touch ul (3 phone numbers), Social Links ul (LinkedIn, YouTube, Vimeo), legal bar paragraph with copyright and legal links. All EDS block conventions met.
evidence.render_strategy: Local HTML parse (no browser render — EDS_TOKEN unavailable)

evidence.check: Footer link coverage vs source footer.links.json
evidence.finding: 93.3% coverage (14/15 unique source paths after normalizing). Only /about-us (source) vs /about (EDS) differs — this is handled by the /about-us → /about redirect in redirects.html. Social links (LinkedIn, YouTube, Vimeo) added beyond source — present as bonus. HubSpot form block present. Phone numbers preserved. Legal bar links all present.

3607 rows, 5 columns (URL, Title, Description, Image, Template). All 3615 manifest pages covered (8 pages share deduplicated EDS paths, accounting for difference). All URLs are EDS-relative paths starting with /. Templates include: homepage, about, service, product, news-post, events, knowledge, knowledge-library, knowledge-expert, profile, careers, careers-story, careers-resource, client-portal, contact, landing, news. No rows with wrong column count.
evidence.render_strategy: Local HTML table parse + manifest JSON comparison (Python)

summary: FAIL — nav link coverage is 52.6% (143/272 source paths), below the 60% threshold; all GitHub config files valid and intact; redirects/metadata/footer/YAML all pass; screenshot comparison not possible as EDS_TOKEN was unavailable and nav/footer not yet uploaded to da.live
